newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9; stock -4.41% in the window. Company remains #1 share in high-end 2.5D flip-chip bonders for advanced packaging. Next earnings Jul 30, 2026.

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node lens: flip-chip bonder leadership in high-end 2.5D packaging is a genuine HBM/chiplet choke-point, supporting the prior 'hold'. No new evidence since June 9 and a -4.4% drift; thesis unchanged. Hold rank ~30 ahead of the Jul 30 print.
verdicts.bull: Largest share in high-end 2.5D flip-chip bonding — direct HBM/chiplet advanced-packaging exposure as CoWoS-class capacity scales.
verdicts.neutral: OSAT/packaging tool demand intact but no fresh order news; awaiting Jul 30 earnings.
verdicts.bear: Small-cap, single-bundle/validation risk; price softened with no catalyst; lumpy equipment orders.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Jul 30 earnings / advanced-packaging bonder order disclosures.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Packaging-capex timing; concentration in a narrow tool line.
